goal: Stabilize mainline governance by converging to a single default entry flow, documenting the current baseline, removing tracked cache/backup artifacts, and making lint checks blocking in CI.
constraints: Do not delete gameplay/content assets casually; only remove tracked cache/backup artifacts that are already covered by .gitignore policy.
Keep legacy battle implementation accessible via explicit query parameter for regression, but not as default flow.
Do not broaden into feature work, visual polish, or gameplay-rule expansion.
deliverables: App default entry is MvpFlowShell, while legacy flow is only enabled via ?legacyFlow=1.
docs/current-baseline.md defines the current single default mainline, legacy access path, and card/data source baseline.
Tracked .vite/deps and backups snapshot artifacts are removed from git tracking.
PR lint checks in workflow files are blocking (no continue-on-error).
